title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for calmer night feeds
subtitle: Warm milk by the bedside, in minutes
voiceover_20s: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough? A bulky warmer has no place on your nightstand. USB-C rechargeable — ready on your nightstand. Quiet night feed setup — warm milk without leaving the room. Save this for your next night feed.
